_about: Single source of truth for Juku machine facts shared between the root reconstruction and the spin-offs (see docs/spinoff-commons.md). Every entry carries a 'provenance' field naming the file(s) it was read from. Consumers (rev B bus contract, testbenches, guards) must derive from this file, never restate numbers independently. Do not hand-edit a value without updating its provenance and re-checking the cited source.

framebuffer.note: Monochrome bitmap; bytes == cols*rows (40*241=9640). Byte-packed, 8 horizontal pixels per byte.

memory_overlay_modes._desc: ROM/RAM overlay is selected by 8255#0 Port C bits[1:0] (I/O port 0x06). '1' regions are served by the ROM overlay, everything else is RAM. Framebuffer at 0xD800 is RAM except where a mode overlays ROM there.

mode0.note: boot/default mode; ekta37 stays in mode 0

memory_overlay_modes.provenance: spinoffs/minimal-vga/hdl/vjuga_juku_top.v:60-71 (overlay() + is_cart); mode-bit source: cosim/trace.c:263-277 (Port C 0x06 / control 0x07 set_mode); spinoffs/minimal-vga/docs/rev-a-gal-equations.md:60-72

rom_image.note: Z80-patched ekta37 firmware; twin loads rom[0:16383]. Physical rev B part is a 27C256 (32KiB) per build-plan C2; only the low 16KiB image is defined here.

io_ports._desc: 8-bit I/O port map as the firmware actually drives it, read out of the cosim reference dispatcher. Ports are the low 8 address bits.

ppi_port_c.role: memory-overlay mode bits[1:0] (also FDC Port C strobes when FDC present)

ppi_control.role: mode-set / bit set-reset on Port C

pic_wiring._desc: 8259-class PIC interrupt-request line assignments, as wired in the root structural twin. Lower number = higher priority.
pic_wiring.provenance: hdl/juku_top.v:709 (ir assignments); frame service vector: docs/fdc-readiness.md:257, spinoffs/minimal-vga/docs/rev-b-build-plan.md interrupts row

timing.note: frame_irq_period is the calibrated keyboard-scan cadence used by the structural twin. FDC timers assume a 2 MHz-equivalent controller clock; 30000 ticks = 15 ms at 2 MHz.
timing.provenance: docs/jmon33-hdl-probe.md:19,32 (frame IRQ period 200000); cosim/juku_fdc.c:273 (30000 ticks = 15 ms at nominal 2 MHz), juku_fdc.h:81
